/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/wah_plugin.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libwah_plugin.so -o libwah_plugin.so CMakeFiles/wah_plugin.dir/wah_plugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wah_plugin.dir/wah.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wah_plugin.dir/wah_plugin.cpp.o  ../../src/libopenamp-dsp.a
